author: skylenet
content:
Can you double check if this looks good for you. (Ignore override timestamps):

```yaml
    - id: erigon-bal-full
      client: erigon
      metadata:
        labels:
          bal-mode: full
      image: ethpandaops/erigon:bal-devnet-3
      extra_args:
        - --override.osaka=1774899169
        - --override.amsterdam=1774899169
        - --fcu.background.commit=false
        - --exec.no-merge=true

    - id: erigon-bal-sequential
      client: erigon
      metadata:
        labels:
          bal-mode: sequential
      image: ethpandaops/erigon:bal-devnet-3
      extra_args:
        - --override.osaka=1774899169
        - --override.amsterdam=1774899169
        - --fcu.background.commit=false
        - --exec.no-merge=true
        # Bal mode flag
        - --exec.serial

    - id: erigon-bal-nobatchio
      client: erigon
      metadata:
        labels:
          bal-mode: nobatchio
      image: ethpandaops/erigon:bal-devnet-3
      extra_args:
        - --override.osaka=1774899169
        - --override.amsterdam=1774899169
        - --fcu.background.commit=false
        - --exec.no-merge=true
        # Bal mode flag
        - --exec.batched-io=false
```
